title: coreopsis lanceolata
intro: Coreopsis lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved coreopsis or tickseed, is a flowering plant species native to eastern North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of coreopsis lanceolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune system function. Coreopsis lanceolata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its root is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
